Dr Mira Okonkwo

Principal robotics engineer at Acme Robotics. Mira leads the vision and calibration team and has shipped more than forty production cells across the automotive, aerospace, and medical-device sectors.

Background

PhD in computer vision from Imperial College London. Eight years at a tier-one automotive supplier designing inspection systems for engine-block lines. Three years at a medical-device startup building closed-loop pick-and-place cells for catheter assembly.

Talks and writing

  • "Calibrating a six-axis arm without a metrology lab" — ROSCon 2023.
  • "What deterministic tests bought us" — RoboBusiness 2024.
  • Maintainer of the open-source cell-calibration-kit package.

Reach Mira at mira@acme-robotics.example or via the contact form.
